title: Self-edit your output
subtitle: Improve one spoken or written answer in three passes.
duolingoBridge: Growth bridges B1 output into B2 preparation through native-style input, longer reasoning, nuance, synthesis, register control, and autonomous correction.
overview: Knowledge point 1: revise content, then structure, then language.
Knowledge point 2: avoid trying to fix everything at once.

items.fr: Pendant la première relecture, je vérifie seulement le contenu.
items.en: During the first rereading, I check only the content.
items.es: Durante la primera relectura, verifico solo el contenido.

items.fr: Je me demande si mon idée principale est vraiment claire.
items.en: I ask myself whether my main idea is really clear.
items.es: Me pregunto si mi idea principal es realmente clara.

items.fr: Ensuite, je regarde la structure et les transitions.
items.en: Then, I look at the structure and transitions.
items.es: Luego miro la estructura y las transiciones.

items.fr: Enfin, je corrige la précision linguistique.
Une amélioration à la fois rend la correction plus efficace.
items.en: One improvement at a time makes correction more effective.
items.es: Una mejora a la vez hace que la corrección sea más eficaz.
